zh-cn.helper_era_guide_content:
调教互动可以简单分为两种：

- 非调教中，【互动】界面下的1对1的EraTW式接触互动（无本番）：选择任意目标后，触摸界面的所有指令都在此类（除开推倒）
不满足条件的互动（脱得不够）不会显示

-正式进入调教的N对N式EraTK多目标互动：在选择了任意目标后点选触摸界面的推倒按钮，与当前房间内的所有人开始调教。
所有互动都会显示，但不满足条件的话无法点选
在任何1对N，N对1，或者N对N的互动中，每个执行者都只能与一个对象进行互动，所以每次都是随机在N个对象中抽选一位进行互动。

调教中，大部分调教指令都默认持续执行。若需要取消持续执行，请在左侧的对象选择界面取消。

调教指令会给NPC增加对应经验，积累了足够的经验后角色的对应技能会自动升级（可在【%%comManager_bottom_inspect%%】的【%%charaDetail_btn_sexRecord%%】中查看）
部位感度，部位尺寸等也能够通过提升对应等级来提高
目前有实装效果的技能只有感度和扩张（没记错的话……）所以请不要花太多时间肝了（且下版本能不能兼容存档都存疑）

所有调教系指令都有对身体部位的要求，如果部分指令无法执行，可能是因为缺乏必要的身体部位，也可能是因为执行者或对象的衣服没脱够

如何测试？
等NPC睡着后眠奸，或者时停奸。选择了NPC后第二个【%%comManager_tab_interact%%】界面内有推倒指令。
部分指令无法执行时，鼠标悬停该指令会显示该指令无法执行的理由
若有随行NPC的话也请解散随行，且部分指令需要指令的执行者能够行动（就不要想着让时停/睡眠中的角色主动为你做什么了）

en-us.helper_era_guide_content:
Training Command can be divided into two types:

- Non training, 1-on-1 EraTW-style touching interactions under the [%%comManager_tab_interact%%] tab: After selecting any target, all commands under the [Interact] tab fall into this category (except 'Push Down').
Interactions that do not meet conditions (such as requiring undressed) will not be displayed.

- EraTK-style multi-target training interactions : After selecting any target, click the 'Push Down' button in the [Interact] tab to start training with everyone in the current room.
All existing commands will be displayed, but those not meeting conditions cannot be selected.
In any 1-vs-N, N-vs-1, or N-vs-N commands, each executor can only interact with one target, so each time one target is randomly selected from N targets for interaction.

During training, most commands are executed continuously by default. To cancel continuous execution, please cancel command in the target selection interface on the left.

Training commands will increase the corresponding experience for NPCs. After accumulating enough experience, the character's traiing skills will automatically level up (can be viewed in [%%charaDetail_btn_sexRecord%%] at [%%comManager_bottom_inspect%%]).
Body part sensitivity, size, etc., can also be increased by raising the corresponding levels.
Currently, the only skills with implemented effects are Sensitivity and Expansion (if I recall correctly...), so please don't spend too much time grinding (and it's doubtful if the next version will be save-compatible).

All training commands have requirements for body parts. If some commands cannot be executed, it may be due to a lack of necessary body parts, or because the executor's or target's clothes are not removed.

How to test?
Wait for the NPC to fall asleep and use 'Sleep Sex', or 'Time Stop Sex'. After selecting the NPC, there is a 'Push Down' command in the [%%comManager_tab_interact%%] tab.
If a command cannot be executed, hovering the mouse over the command will usually display the reason.
If there are accompanying NPCs, please dismiss them. Also, some commands require the executor to be able to move (so don't expect characters in Time Stop/Sleep to actively do anything for you).
